title: prinos rugosus
intro: Prinos rugosus, also known as the rough-leaved prinos, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and easing respiratory congestion, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Prinos rugosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken internally as supplements, or applied topically for skin issues.
